functionalRequirements.requirement: Users should be able to create, read, update, and delete personal tasks
acceptanceCriteria: User can add a new task with title and description
User can view all their tasks
User can edit task details
User can mark tasks as complete
User can delete tasks

functionalRequirements.requirement: Users should be able to set reminders and notifications for tasks
acceptanceCriteria: User can set reminder time for a task
System sends email notification before deadline
User can receive push notifications
User can customize notification preferences

functionalRequirements.requirement: The system should allow users to categorize tasks into different groups
acceptanceCriteria: User can assign category to task (Work, Personal, Health, Urgent)
User can filter tasks by category
System displays category labels on tasks

functionalRequirements.requirement: Users should be able to view tasks in a calendar format
acceptanceCriteria: User can view calendar view of tasks
Tasks are displayed on their due dates
User can navigate between months
User can click on a date to see tasks for that day

functionalRequirements.requirement: Users should be able to set goals and track their progress over time
acceptanceCriteria: User can create a new goal
User can set target value for goal
User can update progress towards goal
System displays progress bar showing percentage complete
User can view goal history

functionalRequirements.requirement: The system should support user authentication and authorization
acceptanceCriteria: User can create account with email and password
User can login with credentials
User can reset password
User can logout
System prevents unauthorized access to other users' data

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: The system should be responsive and accessible on both desktop and mobile devices
The application should load within 2 seconds for the user interface
The system should ensure data security and privacy for user information
The user interface should be intuitive and user-friendly
The application should support at least 1000 simultaneous users

userStories.title: Add a new task
userStories.story: As a user, I want to be able to add a new task so that I can keep track of my responsibilities
acceptanceCriteria: Given I am logged in, when I click 'Add Task', then I see a form
When I enter task details and click 'Create', then the task appears in my list
When I don't fill required fields, then I see an error message

userStories.title: Receive notifications for upcoming tasks
userStories.story: As a user, I want to receive notifications for upcoming tasks so that I don't miss deadlines
acceptanceCriteria: Given I have a task due tomorrow, when the reminder time arrives, then I receive a notification
When I click the notification, then I am taken to that task
When I complete the task, then the notification is dismissed

userStories.title: View my tasks in a calendar
userStories.story: As a user, I want to view my tasks in a calendar so that I can better plan my week
acceptanceCriteria: Given I am on the Calendar page, when I see the month view, then all my tasks are displayed on their due dates
When I click on a date, then I see all tasks for that day
When I navigate to next/previous month, then the calendar updates

userStories.title: Categorize my tasks
userStories.story: As a user, I want to categorize tasks to organize my workload effectively
acceptanceCriteria: Given I am creating a task, when I select a category, then the task is tagged with that category
When I view my task list, then I can filter by category
When I click a category filter, then only tasks in that category are shown

userStories.title: Track my progress towards goals
userStories.story: As a user, I want to see my progress towards goals to stay motivated
acceptanceCriteria: Given I have set a goal, when I update my progress, then the progress bar updates
When I reach my goal target, then I receive a congratulation message
When I view the dashboard, then I see all my goal progress visualized

constraints.description: Must use Node.js and Express for backend
Must comply with GDPR and data protection regulations
